creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.8.7

Note that shlib version is changed from 6 to 7.
PORTREVISION bump is required for the following ports:
  cad/salome, french/aster, french/med, graphics/gdal, math/octave,
  math/scilab, science/cdo, science/cgnslib, science/ecs, science/fvm,
  science/gnudatalanguage, science/hdf-java, science/netcdf4,
  science/py-netCDF4

Port maintainer (koziol@hdfgroup.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
